(define (problem blocksworld-invert-towers)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 1): b2
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 1): b3
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 3): b4-b5-b6 (b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on top)
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 3): b7-b8-b9 (b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on top)
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 6 (height 3): b10-b11-b12 (b10 on table, b11 on b10, b12 on top)
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (clear b12)
    
    ;; Tower 7 (height 3): b13-b14-b15 (b13 on table, b14 on b13, b15 on top)
    (on-table b13)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (was on table, now on top of something or still alone)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 on table, b5 on b6, b4 on top
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b9 on table, b8 on b9, b7 on top
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b12 on table, b11 on b12, b10 on top
      (on-table b12)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Tower 7 inverted: b15 on table, b14 on b15, b13 on top
      (on-table b15)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (clear b13)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
